items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Elliot Alderson.
items.explanation: Elliot Alderson is strongly linked to Mr. Robot.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Will McAvoy.
items.explanation: Will McAvoy is strongly linked to The Newsroom.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Jeff Winger.
items.explanation: Jeff Winger is strongly linked to Community.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Fargo?
items.explanation: Lester Nygaard is one of the defining characters in Fargo.

items.q: The character Eleanor Shellstrop appears in Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.
items.explanation: Eleanor Shellstrop appears in The Good Place, not Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.

items.q: The character Eren Yeager appears in Attack on Titan.
items.explanation: Eren Yeager is a key character in Attack on Titan.

items.q: Which tv show features the character Marty Byrde?
items.explanation: Marty Byrde is associated with Ozark.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Wire?
items.explanation: Jimmy McNulty is one of the defining characters in The Wire.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Six Feet Under?
items.explanation: Nate Fisher is one of the defining characters in Six Feet Under.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Lucius Vorenus.
items.explanation: Lucius Vorenus is strongly linked to Rome.
